title: Fix CLI message post to use structured error handling
description: The `message post` CLI command has its own try/catch + process.exit(1) instead of using `runMutation`. Errors bypass the structured CommandResult envelope and it has no --json flag, unlike every other write command. Refactor to use runMutation for consistency.
acceptance: message post uses runMutation like other write commands.
Errors are surfaced as coded diagnostics, not raw stack traces.
